zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance de Courtenay於1176年出生在法國布格庫尼時，她的父親Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay50歲，母親Isabelle de Courtenay49歲。她於1188年之前與Gasce VI de Poissy結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1231年在法國安喬豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易享年56歲，埋葬在法國安喬豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance de Courtenay于1176年出生在法国布格庫尼时，她的父亲Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay50岁，母亲Isabelle de Courtenay49岁。她于1188年之前与Gasce VI de Poissy结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1231年在法国安喬豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易享年56岁，埋葬在法国安喬豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: When Constance de Courtenay was born in 1176, in Courtenay, Yonne, Burgundy, France, her father, Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay, was 50 and her mother, Isabelle de Courtenay, was 49. She married Gasce VI de Poissy before 1188. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1231, in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, France, at the age of 56, and was buried in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance de Courtenay est née en 1176, à Courtenay, Yonne, Bourgogne, France, son père, Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Courtenay, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Gasce VI de Poissy avant 1188. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1231, à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, France, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, France.

de.Sutton Courtenay, Berkshire, England: Sutton Courtenay, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Constance de Courtenay 1176 in Courtenay, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay 50 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Courtenay 49. Sie hat vor 1188 Gasce VI de Poissy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1231 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, Frankreich und wurde in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance de Courtenay è nata il nel 1176 nel Courtenay, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Courtenay, aveva 49 anni. Lei sposato Gasce VI de Poissy prima del 1188. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1231, nel Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, Francia, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance de Courtenayが1176年にフランスボウルゴグンイオンコウルテナイで生まれた時，父Pierre Ier de France-Courtenayは50歳，母Isabelle de Courtenayは49歳であった。1188年以前にGasce VI de Poissyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1231年にフランスアンジョウフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイで56歳で死去し，フランスアンジョウフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance de Courtenay(이)가 1176년 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 쿠르텐아이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Courtenay(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1188년 이전 Gasce VI de Poissy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1231년 프랑스 앤조우 폰테브라트-'압베이에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 앤조우 폰테브라트-'압베이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance de Courtenay родилась в 1176 г. в местности коуртенеи, енн, бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Courtenay, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gasce VI de Poissy перед 1188 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1231 г. в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, анджоу, Франция в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, анджоу, Франция.
